name: ASUS ROG Strix 1200W Gold Aura Edition Fully Modular Power Supply - 80 PLUS GOLD Certified - ATX 3.0 Compatible - 135mm Axial-tech Fan - Aura Sync RGB - ROG Heatsinks - 1x PCI-E 16-pin Connector - 4x PCI-E 8-pin Connectors (ROG-STRIX-1200G-AURA-GAMING)
